div.div: Single append-only double-entry journal. Entries immutable — corrections are reversing entries only (no edit, no delete). One posting keeps all four books consistent by construction; maps 1:1 to Tally voucher export. Money = exact decimal INR; FY = April–March.

div.div: A ledger entry can carry multiple document links; a link is immutable once made, and a ledger-linked document can never be archived (compliance evidence). 409 if already linked.
